headline: SEPA Names 2026 Power Player Award Winners for Breakthroughs in Grid Resilience, Load Growth Planning, and Global Scaling
summary: Top Honors Awarded to Paul Lau, Pedro J. Pizarro, CPS Energy, EPRI, and PPL Electric SEPA 2026 Power Player Awards Top Honors Awarded to Paul Lau, Pedro J. Pizarro, CPS Energy, EPRI, and PPL Electric WASHINGTON, D.C., May 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Smart Electric Power Alliance (SEPA) today announced the winners of the 2026 Power Player Awards, honoring Paul Lau, CEO and General Manager of SMUD, Pedro J. Pizarro, President and CEO of Edison International, and organizational innovators CPS
